capabilityFamilies.description: Account identity, portfolio snapshot, balances, realized P&L, and current holdings/positions/tax lots. VERIFIED asymmetry: reads span ALL of the user’s Robinhood accounts, not just the Agentic account.
capabilityFamilies.label: Account & portfolio reads

capabilityFamilies.description: Quotes, historicals, fundamentals, financials, technicals, earnings, indexes, symbol search, option chains/instruments/quotes, Level 2 book. Not account-scoped.
capabilityFamilies.label: Market & reference data reads

capabilityFamilies.description: Equity positions, quotes, orders, tradability, and the review→place→cancel order lifecycle. Order writes are Agentic-account-confined.
capabilityFamilies.label: Equities trading surface

capabilityFamilies.description: Option chains/instruments/quotes/positions/orders/historicals, the options watchlist, level-upgrade link, and the review→place→cancel lifecycle. Options level is UNKNOWN and gated.
capabilityFamilies.label: Options trading surface

capabilityFamilies.description: Saved scans, filter-spec discovery, scan CRUD, and run_scan. Scanner output is UNTRUSTED input; run_scan is treated as a write (AG-007 K5).
capabilityFamilies.label: Scanners

capabilityFamilies.description: Watchlist reads and user-initiated CRUD (equity + option). Engine-initiated writes are DENIED per AGENTIC_NON_ORDER_WRITE_POLICY.
capabilityFamilies.label: Watchlists

endpoint.authModel: OAuth 2.1 Bearer, PKCE S256, auth-code + refresh, public client; interactive browser re-auth
endpoint.transport: MCP Streamable HTTP, POST only (GET->405 allow: POST)

failClosedRule: Every UNKNOWN is a runtime FAIL-CLOSED default: not available, not permitted, must be reconciled out of band. Upgrading an UNKNOWN requires a dated primary-source citation OR an authorised-session schema capture committed to docs/mcp/evidence/. A secondary writeup never suffices.

gatedTools.reason: Tool EXISTS in the verified 50 (lists scanner filters), but its output schema is auth-walled. A skill must not hard-code any filter id, operator, or value grammar.
gatedTools.skillRule: May reference the tool by name; MUST discover the filter grammar at session time and validate before building/updating a scan. No filter enumeration in frontmatter or copy.

gatedTools.reason: Tool EXISTS (OHLC bars for option contracts) but input params (interval set, span) and output shape are auth-walled.
gatedTools.skillRule: Reference by name only; no interval/span list, no bar-shape claim. Discover per session.

gatedTools.reason: Tool EXISTS (reported financials by quarter/year) but the field set, period grammar, and multi-symbol cap are auth-walled.
gatedTools.skillRule: Reference by name only; do not assert available line items or period options. Discover per session.

gatedTools.reason: Tool EXISTS (real-time Level 2 book, up to 4 stocks) but the depth, level count, and output shape are auth-walled. The 4-stock cap is the only VERIFIED parameter fact.
gatedTools.skillRule: May state the 4-stock cap and real-time framing; MUST NOT claim a specific book depth or level count. Discover per session.

gatedTools.reason: GET with Accept: text/event-stream returns 405 allow: POST BEFORE auth on both trading and banking hosts. No server-push, no subscription, no webhook in any official article.
gatedTools.ref: quote WebSocket / streaming quotes / SSE subscription
gatedTools.skillRule: MUST NOT claim streaming, push, real-time subscriptions, or WebSocket quotes. Every broker-derived value renders an as-of age; fills are discovered only by polling get_*_orders.

gatedTools.reason: No in-band MCP tool disconnects a session or acts as a server-side kill switch. The only documented control is the user manually disconnecting/reconnecting the MCP in Robinhood’s app (DELETE terminates a session but is auth-gated and client-driven).
gatedTools.skillRule: MUST NOT present a one-click server kill. The kill layer is client-side (per-coil / global / revoke grant / stop runtime) with the platform disconnect as the outer ring only.

gatedTools.reason: Only per-order cancel_equity_order and cancel_option_order exist. No cancel-all, no flatten, no liquidate tool in the 50.
gatedTools.skillRule: MUST NOT claim a cancel-all or liquidate control. Any exit is a separately authorized, order-by-order prepared action.

gatedTools.reason: No money-movement tool in the 50 (33 reads + 11 watchlist/scan writes + 2 reviews + 4 order tools). Banking MCP scope is credit-card, read-only. Funding is a USER action in Robinhood’s app.
gatedTools.ref: deposit / withdrawal / ACH / wire / internal-transfer / bridge tools
gatedTools.skillRule: MUST NOT claim any funding, transfer, deposit, withdrawal, or bridge capability. Cross-rail movement is a prepared handoff (docs/agentic/cross-rail-boundary.md), never an automated transfer.

assetClasses.failClosedDefault: Capsules reject non-equity/non-option execution at compile time.
assetClasses.statement: Long equities and options only. No shorting, crypto, futures, event contracts, or tokenized execution.

confirmation.failClosedDefault: Autonomy is an agent-layer property; the grant is the only real gate; HISS default stays no-autotrade; review before place is structural.
confirmation.statement: Agent can trade without confirmation if so instructed; review_* is simulation, not a server confirmation gate.

dataAccessScope.failClosedDefault: Broker reads stay in the local runtime; pin/filter to the granted account fingerprint before rendering.
dataAccessScope.statement: READ = every Robinhood account (incl. account numbers, positions, balances, full order history, watchlists, scans). WRITE = the Agentic account only.

idempotency.failClosedDefault: Assume none. At-most-once submit; reconcile via C6 order-list diff; never retry place_* on ambiguous failure.
idempotency.statement: No client-order-id / idempotency key documented; schemas auth-walled so absence is inferred, not proven.

marketHours.failClosedDefault: Regular trading hours only; a capsule may narrow, never widen.

orderTypes.failClosedDefault: Only order shapes proven from a live session schema; no TIF/type assumption; trailing stops synthesised from quotes + orders.
orderTypes.statement: No order type is named in any official source.

serverKillSwitch.failClosedDefault: Client-side kill layer is mandatory (per-coil + global); platform disconnect is the outer ring.
serverKillSwitch.statement: Only user-driven disconnect/reconnect of the MCP is documented; no in-band server kill tool.

sessionTokenLifetime.failClosedDefault: Token expiry = HALT + notify, never a retry storm.
sessionTokenLifetime.statement: Token TTLs and revocation propagation undocumented.

streaming.failClosedDefault: Polling only. Fills discovered by polling get_*_orders; every value renders an as-of age.
streaming.statement: No server-initiated event stream. GET/SSE returns 405 allow: POST before auth on trading and banking.

timeInForce.failClosedDefault: No TIF assumed; discover per session.

transferSurface.failClosedDefault: Cross-rail movement is a prepared handoff, never an automated transfer.
transferSurface.statement: No funding, deposit, withdrawal, ACH, wire, internal-transfer, or bridge tool. Banking MCP is card-scoped (credit-card).
